center.name: 泗水 (印尼)
center.summary: 泗水 (印尼)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Javan white-eye，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Surabaya, Indonesia.jpg | image_caption= in a mangrove forest near Surabaya, East Java | status = EN | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Zosterops | species = flavus | authority = (Horsfield, 1821) | synonyms = }} The Javan white-eye (Zosterops flavus) is a bird species in the family Zosteropidae that occurs in Java and Borneo
